calibration_notes: My recent BEARISH calls have been highly accurate (100% next-day, mixed intraday), but I've been too uniform in confidence levels at 65-70% when my actual accuracy is 10% overall. For IWM and NVDA intraday, I underestimated bounce potential in oversold conditions - adjusting to factor in intraday mean reversion after sharp moves. SPY intraday miss was marginal (0.04% move) suggesting correct bias but overaggressive targets.
